title: Native Key
text: Native Key This property determines whether to use the Windows key combinations (such as Ctrl+A for Select All ) to activate the native Windows functions, or to use some of these combinations to execute Uniface functions. " NativeKey = True | False " Value Description True Use the following key combinations to activate Windows functions: Ctrl+A Select All Ctrl+F Find Ctrl+H Replace Ctrl+Z Undo Ctrl+Y Redo False Use the following keys to activate Uniface structure editor functions: Ctrl+A ^Accept Ctrl+H ^Help Ctrl+Z ^Zoom Description This is a static property and can be set in the initialization file but not in ProcScript. Applies To urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
